stemHtml: A blocking anticyclone in the northern hemisphere is:

options.a: a cold anticyclone, situated over Scandinavia and steering depressions.
options.b: a cold anticyclone, situated between 50°N and 70°N and steering depressions.
options.c: a quasi-stationary, warm anticyclone, situated between 50°N and 70°N.
options.d: a quasi-stationary, cold anticyclone, situated between 50°N and 70°N.
